description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to branches excluding gh-readonly-queue/** and on pull requests and merge groups. Use a matrix job across multiple OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest-mingw) with various configurations to build, test, and package the project using CMake, Ninja, and Rust. The workflow should also prepare the environment, cache Rust dependencies, build and test in debug and release modes, run servers, and upload artifacts.
